title: Update CHANGELOG.md and bump Cargo.toml version to 0.5.0

comments.author: maxine--plan-050
comments.content: Covers REQ-10, AC-17, AC-18. Final step before cutting release branch. Bump crosslink/Cargo.toml from 0.4.0 to 0.5.0. Update CHANGELOG.md with all v0.5.0 changes including merged PRs (#294 CLI restructure, #295 kickoff init, #296 TUI scroll) and new features. Run cargo test + cargo clippy to verify AC-17.
